hypothesis: Post-rank web/HN enrichment improves outbound repo click rate on Skills editions without hurting digest quality.
change_summary: Enable DIGEST_ENRICH_WEB for top-N ranked repos before narration (Skills canary first).
notes: PostHog baseline started 2026-06-28. Enrich module (Milestone E) shipped 2026-06-28 — re-run shadow with DIGEST_ENRICH_WEB=1 for side-by-side diffs; score with briefings/lab/shadow-rubric.md. Import snapshots via npm run experiment -- snapshot after baseline (2026-07-11) and treatment windows. After verdict: if keeping enrich, next digest enrich experiment is EXP-20260716-firecrawl-enrich-skills (ENRICH-2; baseline 2026-07-27) — leave DIGEST_ENRICH_WEB=1 so Firecrawl can A/B the web provider against Jina.
